heading: Assignment of Federal service and wages
label: 8522 Assignment of Federal service and wages
text: Notwithstanding , Federal service and Federal wages not previously assigned shall be assigned to the State in which the claimant first files claim for unemployment compensation after his latest discharge or release from Federal service. This assignment is deemed an assignment under for the purpose of this subchapter.section 8504 of this titlesection 8504 of this title
